# @platform/queue-runtime

DEPRECATED (ADR-0006 / ADR-ACT-0288): superseded by apps/platform-api webhook delivery queue (migration 020) + server/worker-registry.ts; do not add new usage; removal review 2026-12-18. Queue abstraction: job enqueue interface, queue topology contracts, and delivery guarantee definitions.

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: deprecation-review
Promotion eligible: false
Semver policy: deprecated
```

## Responsibilities

- Define the typed job enqueue interface and job payload schemas
- Declare queue topology contracts (queue names, job types, priority levels)
- Specify delivery guarantee semantics (at-least-once, exactly-once) per queue
- Decouple producers and consumers from the specific queue broker

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not implement the queue broker connection (owned by adapters-redis/BullMQ)
- Does not own worker job processors (owned by worker-runtime and feature packages)
- Does not manage dead-letter queue reprocessing

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Imported by feature packages to enqueue jobs without coupling to the broker
- worker-runtime imports topology contracts to register consumers
- adapters-redis implements the enqueue interface against BullMQ

## Operational notes

- Queue name changes require coordinated migration ? names are part of the topology contract
- Exactly-once delivery is not guaranteed by default ? idempotent job processors are required
